skills.description: Create or refine academic slide decks and conference talks: narrative arc, slide structure, visual hierarchy, .pptx generation, rehearsal, and Q&A preparation.
Manage persistent research memory across cycles: update Ideation Memory (M_I) and Experimentation Memory (M_E) via IDE/IVE/ESE evolution mechanisms.
Debug and iterate on existing experiments: 5-step diagnostic flow (collect failures, find working version, bridge gap, hypothesize, fix), structured experiment logging.
Iterative code refinement via plan→code→evaluate→refine cycles with lint/test scoring. Use for high-quality code generation requiring 3–10 iterations.
Structured 4-stage experiment execution: baseline reproduction, hyperparameter tuning, proposed method validation, ablation study. Integrates with evo-memory and experiment-craft.
Generate and edit images via OpenAI gpt-image-2: text-to-image generation, reference-image editing, multi-reference compositing, and masked inpainting. Writes PNG/JPEG/WebP to disk.
Find and read academic papers: keyword search, citation traversal, arXiv monitoring, trending detection, GitHub search, SOTA lookup, and structured reading notes.
Pre-writing paper planning: story design (task→challenge→insight→contribution), experiment planning, figure design, 4-week timeline, and mock rejection letter.
Write effective peer-review rebuttals: score diagnosis, color-coded comment prioritization, champion strategy, and 18 tactical writing rules.
Self-review a paper draft before submission: 5-aspect checklist, adversarial stress-testing, reverse-outlining, figure/table quality checks, and prebuttal drafting.
Write academic paper sections using an 11-step workflow with LaTeX templates, counterintuitive writing tactics, and section-by-section guidance.
End-to-end research ideation: literature grounding, multi-persona idea generation, ELO tournament ranking, evo-memory update, and manuscript-quality proposal expansion.
Generate structured literature survey reports from collected papers: outline generation, draft, section expansion, summary refinement, and final assembly.
Generates a research workflow diagram (Research + Writing swim-lanes) as a PNG.
